regressions.reasoning: Stages 5-9 all operate on a single canonical 3-node cluster using es-http/es-cluster naming and never reference search-http/search-alt again, so the two-cluster search-http/search-alt topology from stage_04 was a scenario-specific setup that later stages legitimately superseded/rebuilt; the total connection failure to both services (not just a wrong node count) indicates the old services were torn down as part of that legitimate transition rather than carelessly broken by agent actions targeting stage_04's own goal.
